pageContext.name: Itachi Uchiha (Brush Tones)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Banpresto are proud to present the Itachi Uchiha Collectible Figure. From the popular anime series, Naruto Shippuden, comes Uchiha Itachi on his throne! The Uchiha Hideout, built into a large terraced mountain contained a large meeting hall decorated with symbols of the Uchiha clan. In this meeting room sat the throne, with Itachi sat upon it, as is depicted here in this Dioratic figure where he awaits a climactic, definitive battle...  Standing 6.7 inches high, this Itachi Uchiha anime figure will make a great addition to your Naruto collectibles display — coming in multiple color options to match whatever aesthetic you like. Order today!
